channel.title: MS Smile AI Review Hub

item.title: ChatGPT Windsurf Codex Workflow
item.description: My real AI building process using ChatGPT for thinking and prompts, Windsurf for the first build, and Codex for debugging, refactoring, and polishing.

item.title: ChatGPT Prompts for Windsurf
item.description: How I use ChatGPT to turn a rough project idea into clearer Windsurf prompts before building, testing, and sending focused fixes to Codex.

item.title: Windsurf Prompt Checklist
item.description: A practical checklist I use before sending a coding prompt to Windsurf, with examples for safer first builds.

item.title: Fix Windsurf Mixed Language Issues
item.description: How I fix mixed English and Vietnamese UI or content when Windsurf generates static site pages.

item.title: Windsurf to Codex Workflow
item.description: My practical workflow for using Windsurf to build the first version, then Codex to repair, validate, and clean up the project.

item.title: Best AI Tools for Small Business
item.description: AI tools can help small teams document work, produce content, manage customers, and automate repetitive operations without hiring a large specialist team.

item.title: Best AI Presentation Tools
item.description: AI presentation tools help turn ideas, outlines, and research notes into clearer decks, pitch pages, and visual explanations.

item.title: Best AI Voice Generators
item.description: AI voice generators are useful for creators and teams that need narration, learning content, and repeatable audio workflows.

item.title: AI Tools for Marketers
item.description: Marketing teams use AI tools to draft campaigns, create visuals, compare keywords, and speed up research while still reviewing every output.

item.title: AI Website Builders Comparison
item.description: AI website builders can reduce setup time, but the best choice depends on design control, CMS needs, hosting, and long-term maintenance.

item.title: Best CRM for Startups
item.description: Startup teams need CRM tools that keep sales follow-up organized without adding too much administrative friction.

item.title: AI Productivity Tools
item.description: AI productivity tools help teams plan tasks, schedule work, summarize information, and reduce manual coordination.

item.title: Best Alternatives to Canva AI
item.description: Canva is broad and accessible, but some teams need alternatives for presentations, ads, websites, or more specialized creative workflows.

item.title: Automation Tools for Beginners
item.description: Beginner-friendly automation tools help connect apps, move data, and reduce repeated manual steps across business workflows.

item.title: AI Tools for Content Creators
item.description: Content creators can use AI for planning, writing support, audio, visuals, repurposing, and workflow organization.

item.title: AI Tools Under $20/month
item.description: Low-cost AI tools can be useful for testing workflows before committing to larger SaaS subscriptions.

item.title: How to Choose SaaS Tools Safely
item.description: Choosing SaaS tools safely means checking pricing, terms, data policy, cancellation rules, support, and workflow fit before buying.
